title: stenotaphrum dimidiatum
intro: Stenotaphrum dimidiatum, also known as Buffalo Grass or St. Augustine Grass, is a species of grass that is native to tropical Africa and the Indian Ocean. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stenotaphrum dimidiatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
